scripts.dev: npm run build -w @officepulse/shared -w @officepulse/ai && concurrently -n server,dashboard -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @officepulse/server" "npm run dev -w @officepulse/dashboard"
scripts.dev:bot: npm run build -w @officepulse/shared -w @officepulse/ai && npm run dev -w @officepulse/bot
scripts.check: npm run build -w @officepulse/shared -w @officepulse/ai && npm run check --workspaces
